rationale: Educ. Code §8.011 addresses nepotism prohibitions for regional education service center employees. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: Sec. 8.011. NEPOTISM PROHIBITION. For purposes of all employees of each regional education service center, the executive director and each member of the board of directors are public officials subject to Chapter 573, Government Code.
_note: No conflict; cited rule is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change.
